name: Legend of Zang Hai
overview: "Legend of Zang Hai" follows the son of Imperial Astronomer Kuai Duo. Consumed by vengeance, he spends a decade honing his skills. Assuming the name Zang Hai, he ventures into the capital to uncover the truth, avenge his family, and restore justice.

trailers.title: 【Official Trailer】Legend of Zang Hai: First trailer!🔥 | Xiao Zhan \ Zhang Jingyi | YOUKU
